MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff JCSF is present. Represented by Craig Lipton.
Attorney Edward Singer, Jr. appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Carlos Herrera is present.
Attorney Patrick Nakao representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JAN-14-2013 is vacated.
